---
title: "South Korean Public Diplomacy vis-à-vis the United States: Finding Support for Policies in Washington DC"
date: 2023-07
author:
  - name: Kadir Jun Ayhan
    url: https://kjayhan.github.io
    orcid: 0000-0001-8052-1938
    affiliation: Ewha Womans University Graduate School of International Studies
categories: [Korea, international relations, foreign policy, public diplomacy, 2023]
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Kadir Jun Ayhan</strong> (2023), “South Korean Public Diplomacy vis-à-vis the United States: Finding Support for Policies in Washington DC,” in Mitchell Lerner (ed.) <em>Divided America, Divided Korea: U.S.-Korean Relations During and After the Trump Years</em> (pp. 203-235), Cambridge University Press
---

## Information

The book is forthcoming in Summer 2023.

## BibTeX citation

``` bibtex
@incollection{ayhan_south_2023,
	title = {South Korean Public Diplomacy vis-à-vis the United States: Finding Support for Policies in Washington {DC}},
	pages = {203--235},
	booktitle = {Divided America, Divided Korea: U.S.-Korean Relations During and After the Trump Years},
	publisher = {Cambridge University Press},
	author = {Ayhan, Kadir Jun},
	editor = {Lerner, Mitchell},
	date = {2023},
	note = {Type: Book Section},
}
```
